reviews.comment:
Muy buena onda el muchacho que estaba a cargo... es un lugar que como está fuera de la ruta entra muy pero muy poca gente y eso fue el tema de conversación.
Lejos de tomarlo como una molestia las instalaciones estaban impecables, la amabilidad y el empeño en servir de guía del playero fue destacable.

(Translated by Google)
The guy in charge was really cool... it's a place that's off the beaten path, so very few people go there, and that was the topic of conversation. Far from being a bother, the facilities were spotless, and the attendant's kindness and willingness to guide us were remarkable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dTh2NlhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Increíble la limpieza. La atención  del playero muy amable. Fue única estación de servicios  en 2000 km que hicimos que estaba en esas condiciones. Y no cargamos combustible

(Translated by Google)
Incredible cleanliness. The service from the beach attendant was very friendly. It was the only gas station in the 2,000 km we traveled that was in that condition. And we didn't fill up with gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNGRXY3d3RRAB

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place

reviews.comment:
No nos aceptaron la Visa débito,  solo pasaban la Maestro.  Mal gente,  informan después de cargar el combustible aún cuando se le pregunto al empleado si  aceptaban tarjeta de débito.

(Translated by Google)
They didn't accept Visa debit cards; they only accepted Maestro cards. Bad people, they kept telling us after filling up the gas tank even when we asked the employee if they accepted debit cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbFlueVNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio de otra época, cuando la ruta 40 pasaba por el pueblo. La atención excelente y hospitalaria con los viajeros.

(Translated by Google)
A gas station from another era, back when Route 40 passed through the town. Excellent and hospitable service for travelers.
